news.title: Why is market rising today? Sensex rallies 750 pts, Nifty tops 24,000. 6 key factors driving D-St rebound
news.description: Indian stock markets experienced a significant upswing on Wednesday, with both the Sensex and Nifty registering robust gains. This positive momentum was fueled by a more optimistic investor outlook, following the RBI Governor's indication that further interest rate increases might not be necessary.

news.title: Deutsche Bank Cuts Gold Forecasts up to 22% as Bulls Temper View
news.description: Deutsche Bank AG reduced its gold-price forecasts by as much as 22%, as investors become more wary about the outlook for US monetary policy and investment demand for the precious metal dries up.

news.title: Deutsche Bank cuts gold-price forecast by 22% amid US policy concerns
news.description:
Deutsche Bank's forecast cut signals broader market unease over US monetary policy, potentially diminishing gold's safe-haven appeal.

news.description: Gold steadied after the US and Iran flagged early progress in negotiations to end the war that’s upended global markets and stoked inflation.
